text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of a new, full-fledged training
regimen to get Nice Nature ready to make her
debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But first, I want to see how fast she is currently, so
I ask some other Umamusume to run a scrimmage
with Nice Nature. But then...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah. Heya, Trainer... can we talk for a second?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Nothing is wrong exactly, but here's the deal...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy that you put together this scrimmage
for me, and I reeeeally appreciate it. So much
appreciation. But...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeeeees! I'm gonna run so fast today!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! But if you think I'm gonna let you
pass me, you've got another thing comin'!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What the heck is this lineup?! They're all top-level
runners!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right—I only asked the best of the best. And
it seems quite a few came, either out of curiosity
or a sense of camaraderie.
choice_data_list:
This lineup should be the perfect way to
measure your strength!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: M-more like the perfect way to embarrass myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature starts off without confidence, but
then...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant... Come ooooon!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Look at Nature! She's keeping up with all those
amazing runners!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Her results have always been solid. Seriously,
Nature is a great runner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spectators are right, Nice Nature is in perfect
form today!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I knew it—third place again.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well... Yeah, I guess so. With those runners, I'm
proud of myself for even finishing in third place.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But I was in the best position. I had the advantage in terms of distance, and I still got third...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nice Nature doesn't seem satisfied...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Nature! What a marvelous day for a race! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wanna see your absolute best, Nature! Let's
compete fair and square, like grown women
should! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I put together another
scrimmage. All the racers I invited seem to be
acquainted with Nice Nature...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hold on here. Trainer, you just up and brought all
your favorite racers, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case, I have to say... I like your taste.
If I were you, I'd choose them too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm just joking. I know that they're all more than
just cute faces. They're really fast on top of that.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Natuuurrre! Come on, hurry up and run with
meee! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Um... Is that an angel? Maybe she can cleanse my
soul while we're running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature jokes around, but once the race
starts...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Nature is going so fast! She's keeping up with the
other two!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Woohoo, another third place finish...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Those two are sooo young. I can't even begin to
compete with that kind of energy.
choice_data_list: You aren't that much older than them.
You aren't that much older than them.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I am. Even a one year gap can make a huge
difference.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, now you know, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, what did I run those scrimmages for? You
were sizing up my skills, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: "Close, but not quite." That's me in a nutshell.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I run okay, but "okay" isn't gonna win me the gold.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...The way I see it, the fact that she finishes third
no matter what shows that she's got potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that's not how she sees it. I try to think of the
best way to explain it to her, when...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey! Whatcha doing? Something fun?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Eh?! Teio?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Were you guys running a scrimmage? What a
waste of time...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You guys didn't even invite the best racer
around—me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio. As she says herself, she is the star
runner in the current generation. Many were
singing her praise even before her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which means Tokai Teio will be an unavoidable
wall between Nice Nature and glory.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
She can say all that and not feel even a tinge of
embarrassment. She's certainly something, I'll tell
you that.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Did you say something? Whatever. Come on, get
ready!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Don't just stand there! We're going
head-to-head, Horsegirl to Horsegirl! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll give you the honor of a race!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...S-seriously?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, a battle between Nice Nature and Tokai
Teio abruptly begins.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Phew... The sunset sure is beautiful today.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Another day, another loss! What can I say? That
Tokai Teio sure is strong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The head-to-head with Tokai Teio ended in a
clean defeat, with Nice Nature failing to catch up
to Teio's pace.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Welp, I don't blame myself for losing to her! In
fact, I did well, considering it was after I ran with
Mayano and Marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Yup, it always ends with "I did well." The idea of
a third-rate runner like me shining in a race...
might as well be a pipe dream.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Do you get it now, or do you still want to aim for
victory with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to help make her dreams of shining like a
star come true. As long as we're together, my
feelings will never change.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking about this for a while now,
but... where do you get all that confidence?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Your eyes are shining brighter than mine.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Not sure if I can meet your expectations, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Maybe... it'd be okay for me to dream a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Nice Nature's journey to make her dreams
come true begins!
